arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Aston Villa vs Leicester in the Premier League, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery speaks out on Diego Carlos' future as Aston Villa transfer plan revealed
arts.sum: Unai Emery has confirmed Aston Villa are actively pursuing a right-sided defender this month as Kosta Nedeljkovic will likely leave on loan, but Diego Carlos could remain at the club after the injury suffered by Pau Torres. Asked about whether Villa are planning to recruit a new right-back this month, Emery said: "We have Kosta [Nedeljkovic] and sometimes Bogarde played there.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund chief speaks out on £25m Aston Villa transfer negotiations
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund sporting director Sebastian Kehl has warned Aston Villa Donyell Malen remains of "great value" to the Bundesliga club. Malen joined Dortmund in the summer of 2021 and has scored a total of 39 goals in 131 appearances in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Aston Villa's Donyell Malen setback, Ben Godfrey to Ipswich, Matai Akinmboni to Bournemouth
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Aston Villa's Donyell Malen setback, Ben Godfrey to Atalanta and Matai Akinmboni to Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen linked with Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Donyell Malen could be on the move in the January transfer window as Borussia Dortmund are negotiating with Aston Villa for the sale of the Netherlands international. The Dutch player, who is often deployed on the right wing for club and country, has been in and out of form for Dortmund over the past few […] The post Donyell Malen linked with Aston Villa transfer appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa and Newcastle open talks to sign 'world-class' midfielder who's won four league titles
arts.sum: Newcastle and Aston Villa are looking to strengthen their ranks in the January window and could now make a move to sign one of Europe’s...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Premier League postponement latest as Met Office issues weekend weather warnings
arts.sum: The amber warning for snow and ice is expected to begin at 6pm, an hour after the full-time whistle in the Premier League . Aston Villa supporters will be anxiously checking the weather over the next 24 hours as the Met Office warns of snow and ice this weekend.

arts.ttl: Kehl confirms Malen is "attracting interest on the market" amid Aston Villa links
arts.sum: Sebastian Kehl has commented on reports that Aston Villa are in talks with Borussia Dortmund over the signing of Donyell Malen.

arts.ttl: Fenerbahçe receive conditions to sign Aston Villa player this month
arts.sum: Fenerbahce have been in contact with Aston Villa to discuss the conditions of a move for Diego Carlos this month. That’s according to Ertan Süzgün, who reports that Fenerbahce want to make at least two additions to their defence this summer and have spoken to Aston Villa about Carlos. arts.ttl: Sports director comments as Aston Villa push for transfer – Not surprised by Villans interest
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund sports director Sebastien Kehl has confirmed there is interest in Donyell Malen, with Aston Villa making a bid for him this week. Ruhr Nachrichten cover comments from Kehl today, who insists that the Dutchman is still highly valued by the Bundesliga club.
